title: Sign in with email and password to reach home feed
description: Verifies an authenticated reader can sign in with email/password and land on the home feed.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the home feed

title: Browse home feed and open an article
description: Verifies an authenticated reader can scroll the home feed and open an article to view its full content in article detail.

steps.description: Scroll through the home feed article list
Click an article from the list
Verify full article content is displayed on the article detail screen

title: Complete onboarding and reach login
description: Verifies a new reader can progress through onboarding slides and finish onboarding to reach the login screen.

steps.description: Click the control to advance to the next onboarding slide
Click the control to advance to the next onboarding slide
Click the control to finish onboarding
Verify the user lands on the login screen

title: Required-field validation on login
description: Verifies submitting the login form with a required field empty shows a validation error and does not navigate away.

steps.description: Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Skip onboarding and reach login
description: Verifies a new reader can skip onboarding and is redirected to the login screen.

steps.description: Click the control to skip onboarding
Verify the user lands on the login screen

title: Access control redirects logged-out user from home to login
description: Verifies attempting to access the authenticated home route while logged out redirects the reader to the login screen.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the login screen

title: Article detail provides a stable back path to home
description: Verifies that after opening an article from the home feed, the user can return to the home feed using in-app navigation without losing the feed context.

steps.description: Click an article from the home feed list
Click the in-app control to go back
Verify the user is back on the home feed

title: Article detail is viewable from direct navigation
description: Verifies a reader can navigate directly to the article detail route and see article detail content without being blocked by authentication UI.

steps.description: Verify the article detail screen is displayed
